description: Pushes Telemetry and EVRs to InfluxDB to be viewed with Grafana

defaultTags.title: Default tags
defaultTags.description: Adds tags to all telemetry coming through. Useful when you want to attach session information to telemetry for indexing

token.title: Access Token
token.description: InfluxDB Access Token. You can create one from load-data -> API Tokens

bucket.title: Bucket
bucket.description: InfluxDB bucket where this session's data will be pushed to. All telemetry from all FSW sources will be pushed here during this session.

ert.title: ERT
ert.description: Attach Earth-Return-Time as an additional field to every point
